sizing_rule.note: Apply shrink multiplier (0.5 example) to average trade value when expecting performance decline after strong recent results, then recalculate optimal f on adjusted average trade. Shrink multiplier ranges 0–1 as decimal.

source_rule_text: Use a shrink multiplier to adjust the average trade size downward when expecting performance degradation, then recalculate optimal f based on the reduced average trade value.
